parts.answer: Any two from : fuel; OR petrol additive; OR solvent / tinctures; OR (making) perfumes; OR varnishes; OR preserving biological specimens / preserving food; OR essence / flavourings; OR antiseptic / kill bacteria (in medicine) / sterilizer; OR antitussive agent; OR (in) disinfectant / hand sanitizer; OR to make esters / esterification; OR to make ether(s); OR to make amines; OR to make carboxylic acid(s) / vinegar / ethanoic acid; OR thermometers; OR alcohol lamp / spirit burners; OR any other suitable use; I medicine (unqualified) / chemical feedstock Page 12 Mark Scheme Syllabus Paper

cracking / crack; (hexane to obtain) ethene / C H; C H → C H + C H; hydration (of ethene) / hydrate / hydrated or add(ition of) water / add(ition of) steam / addition; C H + H O → C H OH; I fractional distillation / distillation wherever mentioned I catalytic / thermal + other conditions Ethene / C H can be given in either equation whether the equation is otherwise correct or not I state symbols A multiples / other equations e.g. C H → 3C H + H C H → 2C H + C H C H → C H + C H + H A any correct equations in which carbon is produced e.g. C H → 2C H + 2C + 3H A additional I conditions / react with water I C H O / state symbols A multiples
